# Code of Conduct

## Our Standards

- Be respectful and constructive in all interactions.
- Criticism should target code and ideas, not people.
- Assume good intent.

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Harassment, insults, or personal attacks of any kind.
- Dismissing contributions without explanation.

## Reporting

Open a private issue or contact the maintainers directly via GitHub.

## Enforcement

Maintainers may remove comments, close issues, or block users who violate these standards.
